name: Broccoli with Bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove broccoli leaves, cut tough stalk ends off. Wash and cut into spears.
2. Cook in boiling water for 6 to 8 minutes or until tender; drain.
3. Keep warm in serving dish.
4. Cook 2 tablespoons drippings in a skillet. Crumble bacon and put aside.
5. Cook walnuts, if desired, in the drippings over medium-high heat, stirring constantly, for 3 minutes. Add green onions and cook for 2 more minutes, stirring constantly. Spoon over broccoli.
6. Sprinkle bacon on.
